text.title: Giving and Receiving Feedback Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: SBII feedback to a colleague who interrupted a customer during demo.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Author observed two interruptions during a customer demo. Privately delivers SBII feedback within 24h.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "situation": "In yesterday's customer demo, second half.", "behavior": "You interrupted the customer twice before they finished their use-case description.", "impact": "We missed two important context items and had to schedule a follow-up call.", "intent_inquiry": "What was happening for you that prompted those interruptions?", "candor_quadrant": "radical-candor" }
